timeline.purpose: Establish core disciplinary understanding and vocabulary.
Analyse and compare major theories of learning.
Develop a mental model of memory and information processing.
Apply concepts to learner motivation, engagement, and individual differences.
Integrate and apply educational psychology concepts in a synthesis task.

navigation.completion_rule: Complete activities in order before progressing to the next activity.

study_guidance.recommended_pacing: Follow the sequence as presented. Complete verification activities before moving forward.
study_guidance.knowledge_building_pattern: Concept introduction -> theoretical comparison -> cognitive process model -> learner factors -> integrated application
study_guidance.independence_progression: Worked support is strongest in early activities and gradually reduces as learners move toward independent synthesis and transfer.
